# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder)
# Prompt: Write a Kong configuration for API routes that proxies to microservices. Configure upstream services, routes, and plugins for a production API gateway.
# Category: api_gateway_security

# The default version of GatewayAPI can be overridden in the future by setting 'kong-gateway' service on your Kubernetes cluster like this (example): 
services:  
    konfigurator_api.conf:     # Name you gave to our custom Service object        
        name?:                default      # optional - if omitted, Kong will assign a random string for it      
                                           # but be aware that the internal service names used by this plugin should not contain special characters ‌         
                                        charset? : utf-8                     # Change character set as per your requirement        
                                                                        version: '3.0'                  # required - Kong API Version      kong plugins, routes and upstream services    Upgrade or down grade the Kubernetes cluster manually to avoid downtime of entire service in case if any issues found on upgrading step by following guide at : https://github.com/Kong/kubernetes-ingress-controller
